text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 92 

GAP_INNPP_COPAY_1M 

LABEL: Gap In-Network Non-Preferred Pharmacy Copay for 1-month supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-payment amount for a 1-month supply of the drugs on this 
tier, using an in-network non-preferred pharmacy (INNPP; also known as a standard retail pharmacy 
within a split network) during the coverage gap phase of the Part D
